claimElements.evidence: Policy-revision resources, propose/review/commit audit records, lineage nodes (draft + committed), lifecycle transitions, capability advertisements, and two profile declarations (proposer-scope, privacy-tier) are all schema-valid; see examples/adaptations/helios-governance-registry/manifest.json

16 of 19 bundle artifacts are JSON-Schema-validated against the seven baseline schemas; the 3 prose-validated artifacts (slots 06, 08, 13) are evidence-attestation files including the redacted review evidence at slot 08 (examples/adaptations/helios-governance-registry/08-evidence-attestation.review.redacted.example.json)

Three audit records (proposal/review/commit) demonstrate the governance flow; lineage chain from draft to committed; transition draft to active; privacy-tier profile declaration at slot 17 demonstrates redaction policy at rest. See docs/adaptations/helios-governance-registry.md.

Governance envelopes carry proposal/review/commit semantics independent of any transport binding; redaction of review evidence is a transport-neutral concern enforced by the privacy-tier profile declaration at examples/adaptations/helios-governance-registry/17-profile-declaration.privacy-tier.example.json
